ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner of the asset */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset involved in the transaction */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol, if applicable */,
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of transaction (e.g., Purchase, Sale, Transfer) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount involved in the transaction */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the transaction */,
  "fee" TEXT /* Any fees associated with the transaction */,
  "tax_implication" TEXT /* Tax implications of the transaction (e.g., gain, loss) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset owner */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Account number or identifier */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., Individual, Joint, Institutional) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol, if applicable */,
  "asset_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of asset (e.g., Stock, Bond, ETF) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Security Identification Procedures number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_asset_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_type_id") REFERENCES asset_types ("asset_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "transaction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type (e.g., Purchase, Sale, Transfer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_types" (
  "asset_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset type */,
  "asset_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset type (e.g., Stock, Bond, ETF) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the asset on the given date */,
  "change_percent" TEXT /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the asset on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_performance_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset */,
  "regulation" TEXT /* Regulation that the asset must comply with */,
  "status" TEXT /* Compliance status of the asset */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last audit */,
  "audit_result" TEXT /* Result of the last audit (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_compliance_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has to the asset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when access was granted */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when access will expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Price Change, Compliance Issue) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., new, read, dismissed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration log entry */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., Data Export, Data Import) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., Success, Failed) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the integration event */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message, if any */,
  "data_transferred" INTEGER /* Amount of data transferred during integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Table where the change occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Record ID of the changed record */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Column name that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed column */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed column */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)
